scenarios.name: starter_need_fill_now
scenarios.description: Open DL starter need with a thin current tier and next-pick availability risk.

needTimingReasons: Comparable DL options are unlikely to last to the next pick.
DL tier drop risk is high.

scenarios.name: starter_need_wait_one_turn
scenarios.description: Open DL starter need, but several comparable DL options project to survive and WR value is stronger.

needTimingReasons: Comparable DL options are likely to be available near the next pick.
Forcing this need has high opportunity cost versus the board.

scenarios.name: kicker_wait
scenarios.description: Open K slot in an early round should not force a kicker.

needTimingReasons: Comparable K options are unlikely to last to the next pick.
K tier drop risk is high.
